texto: Helping teacher leaders come to understand their gifts is the first step in developing a specialty. Some leaders are great coaches and should focus on instructional leadership in a district or network where that is valued and supported. Great conceptual thinkers are good in startup mode but the daily grind of leading a school doesn't suit them. Other leaders thrive on the turnaround challenge. The dynamic blended future of education will allow more role specialization.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tom Vander Ark sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Helping teacher leaders come to understand their gifts is the first step in developing a specialt…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, education, leadership, útil em momentos de termino e trabalho.
